title: Mirai STEM Cohort A — Onboarding Handbook
description: Full onboarding handbook for Cohort A schools. Includes program overview, grant requirements, roles, and year 1 milestones.

title: Q1 Milestone Report Template
description: ODE-approved Q1 grant milestone report template. Complete all required fields before uploading to this course.

title: Equity Audit Phase 2 — Disaggregated Data Dashboard
description: Secure link to the district disaggregated student outcome data dashboard. Access restricted to working group members.

title: Board Equity Report — Draft Recommendations
description: Draft Board equity report for working group review. Add comments using Suggesting mode only. Final version due February 10.

title: FY2026-27 Budget Scenario Analysis — Three Pathways
description: Confidential budget scenario analysis prepared by the CFO. Three reduction pathways modeled: personnel, programs, and operations. For leadership use only.

title: Oregon Revenue Forecast — March 2026
description: Oregon Legislative Revenue Office March 2026 forecast — relevant for projecting CRUSD state funding outlook for FY2026-27.

title: CRUSD-EA Collective Bargaining Agreement — Current
description: Current CBA between CRUSD and the CRUSD Education Association. Secured — HR access only. Reference for current salary schedules, leave provisions, and work conditions.

title: MTSS Fidelity Survey Tool — Year 2
description: Updated 25-item MTSS Implementation Fidelity Survey for the 2025-26 school year. Complete and return before December 12.

title: Google Workspace for Education — Admin Quick-Start Guide
description: CRUSD IT-customized quick-start guide for staff new to Google Workspace for Education Plus. Covers account setup, shared drives, and data security settings.

title: Four Finalist Bell Schedule Models — Summary Comparison
description: Side-by-side comparison of the four finalist bell schedule models. Includes instructional minutes, period lengths, start and end times, and estimated implementation cost for each.

title: CRUSD Crisis Communication Protocol 2025-26
description: Updated crisis communication protocol including new multilingual alert procedures for Spanish, Vietnamese, and Somali families. Supersedes the 2024-25 version.

title: OSBA Board Governance Training Portal
description: Oregon School Boards Association member training portal. Board members will access Modules 1-6 through this link. Use your OSBA member credentials.

title: OSHA HazCom 2025 — Facilities Staff Reference Guide
description: CRUSD facilities department reference guide for updated OSHA Hazard Communication Standard 2025. Includes chemical inventory procedures and SDS log requirements.

title: Cedar Bluff HS SIP 2025-26 — Full Plan
description: Approved Cedar Bluff High School School Improvement Plan for 2025-26. Five goals, theory of action, and evidence targets. Reference document for mid-year reporting.

title: CRUSD New Employee Benefits Guide 2025-26
description: Complete benefits enrollment guide including health, dental, vision, PERS retirement, and supplemental insurance options. Enrollment deadline is 30 days from hire date.

title: ODE Grant Expenditure Template — Standard Format
description: Oregon Department of Education standard budget actuals template required for Mirai STEM quarterly reporting. Use this exact template — submissions in other formats will be rejected.

title: CRUSD SEL Assessment Results — District Summary 2025-26
description: District-wide SEL assessment results summary. Data disaggregated by school, grade, and demographic group. For counseling team use — FERPA protected.

title: ODE Dual Language Certification Pathway — Updated 2026
description: Oregon Department of Education updated Dual Language Bilingual Education certification pathway document. Includes new coursework requirements effective July 1, 2026.

title: FERPA and Oregon Student Data Privacy — Staff Reference
description: CRUSD staff reference guide on FERPA obligations and Oregon student data privacy law (ORS 326.565). Updated to reflect 2025 Oregon legislative session amendments.

title: CRT Framework Overview — Hammond Culturally Responsive Teaching
description: Summary of the Zaretta Hammond CRT framework used as the foundation for this PD series. Includes the four quadrants of the framework and key strategies for each.

title: Mirai STEM Cohort B — School Readiness Assessment Form
description: 20-item readiness assessment for schools invited to join Cohort B. Complete and return to Tom Reilly by January 20. Results will inform cohort selection and support plans.

title: PAPEA Spring 2026 — Session 2 Recording: Restorative Practices
description: Recording of the PAPEA Spring 2026 regional panel on restorative practices in K-12 districts. Featuring three Pacific Northwest superintendents. Runtime: 45 minutes.

title: Network Vendor Bid Evaluation Rubric
description: Seven-criterion vendor evaluation rubric for the district network infrastructure RFP. Criteria: technical capability, cost, timeline, support, security, references, and local presence.

title: IDEA 2004 and Oregon OAR Special Education — Key Provisions
description: Annotated reference guide to IDEA 2004 key provisions and corresponding Oregon Administrative Rules for special education. Updated through the 2024 Oregon legislative session.

title: CRUSD Principal Leadership Framework and Evaluation Rubric
description: District principal evaluation framework aligned to the Oregon Framework for Teacher and Administrator Evaluation. Includes performance descriptors and evidence examples for all 6 domains.
